[00:23.77] That snowflake once fell on my nose
[00:28.72] Now flying backwards to last winter
[00:35.02] I realize that hellos are goodbyes
[00:39.89] The moment I softly let go of your hand
[00:46.51] Winds hum through the trembling branches
[00:51.39] A song for a soul bound to soar to
[00:55.05] The very edge of the starry ocean
[00:57.93] Even if we're meant to fall apart
[01:02.81] I will gaze at where you are for all time
[01:08.05] Bon voyage
[01:10.80] May your path be clear
[01:13.61] May you get to where dreams are all crystalline and sweet
[01:20.81] Please crack a little smile
[01:25.07] You won't be alone
[01:27.61] In this world you've chosen as your own
[01:32.25] Don't worry
[01:34.26] I'm well aware that all snowflakes melt in the end
[01:43.62] Which is sign of warmth and hope of spring
[01:48.63] So I'll dance flamboyantly into that good night
[02:05.07] Bon voyage
[02:07.94] May your path be clear
[02:10.76] May you get to where dreams are all crystalline and sweet
[02:17.95] Please crack a little smile
[02:22.18] You won't be alone
[02:24.74] In this world you've chosen as your own
[02:29.47] Timing is such a dazzling riddle
[02:35.06] Guess I'll spend my whole life unraveling it
[02:40.80] Though it might cost me everything I have
[02:46.52] I never regret it wouldn't have it any other way cuz
[02:52.33] Those who trace starlight on their lonely roads
[02:57.90] Will find their destinations in the cosmos
[03:03.65] Meeting you in that swirling snowfall's
[03:09.49] The most beautiful thing ever happened to me

title: 昔涟
lrc:
[00:00.20] 昔涟 (《崩坏：星穹铁道》昔涟动画短片中文单曲) - 张韶涵/HOYO-MiX
[00:04.27] 作曲 Composer：崔瀚普TSAR (HOYO-MiX)
[00:05.91] 作词 Lyricist：烧鸡/KBShinya/陆棠疏
[00:07.15] 编曲 Arranger：崔瀚普TSAR (HOYO-MiX)
[00:07.21] 制作人 Producer：崔瀚普TSAR (HOYO-MiX)/宫奇Gon (HOYO-MiX)
[00:07.22] 曾许下心愿 等待你 的出现
[00:14.16] 褪色的秋千 有本书 会纪念
[00:21.29] 我循着时间 捡起梦 的照片
[00:28.37] 童话还没有兑现 却需要说再见
[00:37.33] 如果有一天 岁月晕开书页
[00:43.44] 请把我 模糊的字迹当作 笑脸
[00:50.68] 很久前 想象 今天 画面
[00:55.90] 哭着 笑着 告别
[00:58.47] 陌生的情节 熟悉的侧脸 都重叠 oh~
[01:04.86] 出发前 无数 星光 缱绻
[01:10.20] 有回忆 落在 指尖
[01:15.98] 当世界向前 我会在原地 流连
[01:51.20] 当漪涟 一滴 一点 出现
[01:56.33] 轻轻 去向 天边
[01:58.92] 不管多遥远 都是追不上 的思念 oh~
[02:05.40] 会不会 可能 还能 相见
[02:10.65] 再回头只看一眼
[02:19.56] 当漪涟 消散 万千 不见
[02:24.85] 永恒和瞬间都 被爱意成全
[02:28.88] 我的明天叫做昨天 Hoo~
[02:33.74] 要相信 浪漫 一如 初见
[02:39.04] 请笑着 向我 道别
[02:44.84] 最后这一页 就让它无言
[02:51.95] 我会在扉页 等待你续写 起点
